acceptanceFocus: orchestrateIteration and adjacent SDK effect surfaces no longer resolve routable task effects directly when tasks-mux routing applies
agent-platform CLI orchestration resolveAndPostEffect delegates routing decisions to tasks-mux
plugin stop-hook mode queries tasks-mux before deciding host-agent delegation versus internal resolution
internal responder tasks route to agent-core through tasks-mux
agent responder tasks route through AgentMuxResponderBackend
human responder tasks route through BreakpointBackend
tracker responder tasks route through ExternalTrackerBackend when available or fail with explicit unsupported/unavailable evidence
tests prevent direct SDK or agent-platform bypass routing to adapters for task effects
